_description: Recorded OpenAI Agents SDK response shape for a single-shot 'hello' prompt. Story 10.2 AC-10.2.4. Post-empirical-probe (2026-05-25 cross-LLM retry) — the real `agents.RunResult` exposes usage at `context_wrapper.usage`, NOT a top-level `usage` attribute. The JSON fixture's flat `usage` key here is convenience for the unit test's `_FakeRunResult` constructor; the adapter reads the canonical nested path via `context_wrapper.usage.input_tokens` + `.input_tokens_details.cached_tokens`.
_empirical_probe_note: RunResult has NO cost attribute — total_cost_usd here is hypothetical / for symmetry with future SDK shapes. _extract_cost returns 0.0 on the real SDK; cost computation from priced(model) × tokens is Phase-2 work tracked at C70.
final_output: Hello! How can I help you today?
